title: Sic 'Em
description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 5 damage.
Whenever [gold]Osty[/gold] hits this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] 2.
upgraded_description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 6 damage.
Whenever [gold]Osty[/gold] hits this enemy this turn, [gold]Summon[/gold] 3.
notes: Requires Osty to be present to play. Card glows red as a warning if Osty is missing.
